chapters.title: Forest of Whispers
chapters.intro_dialogue: The trees remember a time before fear... The Void does not arrive... it forgets us into itself.

chapters.title: Crystal Caverns
chapters.intro_dialogue: The crystals are singing backwards... they are recording lost timelines.

chapters.title: Volcanic Wastes
chapters.intro_dialogue: Even fire forgets how to burn correctly now...

chapters.title: Sky Citadel
chapters.intro_dialogue: Even the sky is learning how to fall... Gods are not immune, just delayed.

chapters.title: Frozen Tundra
chapters.intro_dialogue: We froze time to survive the Void... it learned patience.

chapters.title: Golden Palace
chapters.intro_dialogue: A throne is just a memory of control.

chapters.title: Abyss Deep
chapters.intro_dialogue: The Void is not coming. It already happened elsewhere.

chapters.title: Celestial Realm
chapters.intro_dialogue: We are not gods. We are survivors of older collapse.

chapters.title: Void's End
chapters.intro_dialogue: You call me darkness because you fear simplicity.

final_choice.B: Accept Void (Universe resets into single consciousness)
